subject: upgrade rancher/k8s to 1.6.25
commit_message:
upgrade rancher/k8s to 1.6.25

Change-Id: I086ceeebe78c2782cb0f752f1e214794e4f8ca46
Issue-ID: LOG-895
Signed-off-by: root <frank.obrien@amdocs.com>

entries.message:

test results - openstack - testing AWS next
